metadata.guardrail: AI copy is generated from validated metrics and does not modify numeric source data.

hero.headline: Closed-won revenue is behind goal by $250,000
hero.body: The latest CRM refresh shows $1,750,000 in closed-won sales against a $2,000,000 goal, leaving the team at 88% of target.

cards.title: Goal status changed
cards.body: Closed-won sales missed the $2,000,000 goal by $250,000. The website copy changed because the CRM-derived metric changed.

cards.title: Pipeline context
cards.body: The validated export contains 12 opportunities totaling $8,200,000, with $5,241,300 in weighted pipeline.

cards.title: Regional concentration
cards.body: West is the largest region in this refresh at $3,830,000 across 4 opportunities.

cards.title: Follow-up queue
cards.body: 2 open opportunities have not been updated in 21+ days, so they stay visible for review.
